title: thymus pseudocollinus
intro: Thymus pseudocollinus, also known as Thymus serpyllum, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a useful remedy for sore throats and coughs. The health benefits of Thymus pseudocollinus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and act as an antiseptic. Thymus pseudocollinus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
